message:
feat: remove unwanted init files and improve gitignore

- Remove generation of Windows wrapper files: claude-flow@alpha.bat, claude-flow@alpha.ps1, claude-flow.bat, claude-flow.ps1
- Remove generation of claude-flow@alpha.config.json configuration file
- Add missing directories to gitignore: memory/, coordination/, .claude-flow/
- Update help files to reflect removed files
- Bump version to 2.0.0-alpha.119

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 #!/bin/sh
 # Claude-Flow Smart Dispatcher - Detects and uses the best available runtime
 
-VERSION="2.0.0-alpha.118"
+VERSION="2.0.0-alpha.119"
 
 # Determine the correct path based on how the script is invoked
 if [ -L "$0" ]; then

@@ -15,6 +15,9 @@ const CLAUDE_FLOW_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES = `
 claude-flow.config.json
 .swarm/
 .hive-mind/
+.claude-flow/
+memory/
+coordination/
 memory/claude-flow-data.json
 memory/sessions/*
 !memory/sessions/README.md
@@ -30,8 +33,7 @@ coordination/orchestration/*
 *.sqlite-journal
 *.sqlite-wal
 claude-flow
-claude-flow.bat
-claude-flow.ps1
+# Removed Windows wrapper files per user request
 hive-mind-prompt-*.txt
 `;

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@

   "name": "claude-flow",
-  "version": "2.0.0-alpha.118",
+  "version": "2.0.0-alpha.119",

   "mcpName": "io.github.ruvnet/claude-flow",
   "main": "cli.mjs",

@@ -15,6 +15,9 @@ const CLAUDE_FLOW_GITIGNORE_ENTRIES = `
 claude-flow.config.json
 .swarm/
 .hive-mind/
+.claude-flow/

+coordination/
 memory/claude-flow-data.json
 memory/sessions/*
 !memory/sessions/README.md
@@ -30,8 +33,7 @@ coordination/orchestration/*

 `;
